Myth Busters · 第 03 期 Myth Busters · No. 03
数据证伪 / 量化金融 / 技术分析 Data-Driven Debunking / Quant Finance / Technical Analysis

"我已经把所有那些关于价格-数量、移动平均线、强度和走势分析的讨论标签为'金融占星术'。"

"I've labeled all those discussions of price-volume, moving averages, strength and trend analysis as 'financial astrology'."

—— Burton G. Malkiel, A Random Walk Down Wall Street, 12th edition, 2019

均线交叉是真信号，还是金融占星术？

Are Moving Average Crossovers Real Signals — or Financial Astrology?

"5 日线上穿 20 日线就买，下穿就卖"——这是中文炒股圈最广为流传的入门信号。本文用 1990–2024 年 35 年真实日度数据 + 5 个独立量化检验，看看技术分析到底能否预测股价。

"Buy when the 5-day SMA crosses above the 20-day SMA, sell when it crosses below" — this is the entry-level technical signal taught in every retail trading guide. We use 35 years of real daily data (1990–2024) and 5 independent quant tests to see whether moving-average signals actually carry information.

2 个市场 · 8,817 + 6,663 个交易日 · 1,018 参数组合 · 27 条引用 2 markets · 8,817 + 6,663 trading days · 1,018 parameter combos · 27 references
代码与数据：github.com/yifan70932/Simple-Moving-Average-Myth-Buster Code & data: github.com/yifan70932/Simple-Moving-Average-Myth-Buster
结论先行 Bottom Line

在 35 年 S&P 500 真实数据上：SMA 5/20 把 $1 从 1990 年变成 2024 年的 $3.1，而 buy-and-hold 同期变成 $16.4。MACD 金叉/死叉在所有 18 个 t/Mann-Whitney/Bootstrap 检验中 p > 0.05，金叉之后的回报反而略低于死叉。1018 个 SMA 参数组合中没有一个 Sharpe > 0.5。结论与 Brock-Lakonishok-LeBaron (1992) → Sullivan-Timmermann-White (1999) → Bajgrowicz-Scaillet (2012) 这一脉学术共识一致：朴素技术信号不携带可执行的预测信息。但有一个例外——慢速 SMA 50/200 不是预测信号，而是风险管理过滤器，确实能降低最大回撤——这是与流言完全不同的另一回事。

On 35 years of real S&P 500 data: SMA 5/20 turned $1 from 1990 into $3.1 by 2024, while buy-and-hold turned it into $16.4. MACD golden/death crosses fail all 18 t/Mann-Whitney/Bootstrap tests at p > 0.05, with death-cross returns actually slightly higher than golden-cross. None of 1,018 SMA parameter combinations achieved Sharpe > 0.5. Findings are consistent with the academic consensus from Brock-Lakonishok-LeBaron (1992) through Sullivan-Timmermann-White (1999) to Bajgrowicz-Scaillet (2012): naive technical signals carry no actionable predictive information. One nuance: slow SMA 50/200 isn't a predictive signal but a risk-management filter, and it does reduce drawdowns — that's a different thing from what the myth claims.

流言是怎么说的 What the Myth Says

打开任何一本中文炒股入门书或 B 站股票教学视频，几乎一定会教你这套操作信号："5 日均线上穿 20 日均线就买入（金叉），下穿就卖出（死叉）；MACD 在零轴上方金叉是强买信号，在零轴下方死叉是强卖信号。" 这套教学的隐含承诺是：通过观察均线交叉这种简单可视化信号，普通散户也能精准抓住涨跌时机，甚至跑赢专业投资者。

Open any retail Chinese trading manual or YouTube stock-tutorial video and you'll almost certainly find this rule: "Buy when the 5-day SMA crosses above the 20-day SMA (golden cross), sell when it crosses below (death cross). MACD golden cross above the zero line is a strong buy signal; death cross below the zero line is a strong sell signal." The implicit promise is that retail investors can time the market — even outperform professionals — using a simple visual signal.

这种教学有迷人的内在吸引力："价格已经把所有信息消化进去了，所以历史价格本身蕴含未来"。这是技术分析的基本前提，叫做"市场行为反映一切"[1]。Edwards & Magee 那本 1948 年首版的《股价趋势技术分析》是这一传统的奠基性著作，至今在中英文交易圈中仍被作为经典教材。

The teaching has an irresistible inner logic: "prices already digest all information, so historical prices contain the future." This is technical analysis's foundational premise, often summarized as "market action discounts everything"[1]. Edwards & Magee's Technical Analysis of Stock Trends (first edition 1948) remains the canonical text and is still cited in Chinese and English trading literature alike.

技术分析师追求的不是因果解释，而是模式识别。任何有效的"信号"都必须能在样本外重复——这是它与占星术的唯一区别。 —— John Murphy, 《金融市场技术分析》, 1999
What technical analysts pursue is not causal explanation but pattern recognition. Any "valid" signal must repeat out-of-sample — that is the only thing distinguishing it from astrology. —— John J. Murphy, Technical Analysis of the Financial Markets, 1999

Murphy 提出的标准——样本外可重复性——正是现代量化金融检验技术分析的核心方法。本文遵循同样的标准。

Murphy's criterion — out-of-sample repeatability — is exactly the standard modern quant finance uses to test technical analysis. This article follows that standard.

方法 Method

数据：S&P 500 (^GSPC) 1990-01-02 至 2024-12-31 共 8,817 个交易日；上证综指 (000001.SS) 1997-07-02 至 2024-12-31 共 6,663 个交易日。两者均为 Yahoo Finance 调整后收盘价（Open-High-Low-Close 中的 adjusted close）[2]。

Data: S&P 500 (^GSPC) from 1990-01-02 to 2024-12-31, 8,817 trading days; Shanghai Composite (000001.SS) from 1997-07-02 to 2024-12-31, 6,663 days. Both are Yahoo Finance adjusted close prices[2].

五个独立检验：

Five independent tests:

检验 1 — 策略对比：SMA 5/20、10/30、20/60、50/200 四种交叉策略 vs buy-and-hold，在 35 年期间的累积回报、年化波动率、Sharpe 比率、最大回撤。
检验 2 — MACD 事件研究：MACD(12,26,9) 金叉/死叉发生后 5/20/60 天的前向回报，与随机日做 Welch t 检验、Mann-Whitney U 检验、Bootstrap 置换检验三种方法对照。
检验 3 — 参数网格：扫描 fast ∈ {3..30} × slow ∈ {20..200} 共 1,018 个 SMA 参数组合，看多少能击败 buy-and-hold——这是数据探查偏差 (data-snooping bias) 的实证演示。
检验 4 — 交易成本敏感性：在 0/5/10/20/50 bps 不同交易成本假设下，测试各策略 Sharpe 衰减。
检验 5 — 滚动信息系数 (IC)：SMA 信号值与未来 20 天回报在 252 天滚动窗口下的 Pearson 相关性时序变化。

Test 1 — Strategy comparison: SMA 5/20, 10/30, 20/60, 50/200 vs buy-and-hold over 35 years: CAGR, annualized vol, Sharpe ratio, max drawdown.
Test 2 — MACD event study: 5/20/60-day forward returns following MACD(12,26,9) golden/death crosses vs random days, with Welch t-test, Mann-Whitney U, and Bootstrap permutation test.
Test 3 — Parameter grid: Scan fast ∈ {3..30} × slow ∈ {20..200}, 1,018 SMA parameter combinations — how many beat buy-and-hold? An empirical demonstration of data-snooping bias.
Test 4 — Transaction cost sensitivity: Sharpe ratio under 0/5/10/20/50 bps round-trip cost assumptions.
Test 5 — Rolling Information Coefficient: 252-day rolling Pearson correlation between SMA signal value and 20-day forward returns.

检验 1：朴素 SMA 策略 vs Buy-and-Hold Test 1: Naive SMA Strategies vs Buy-and-Hold

最直接的检验：如果 SMA 交叉信号有用，按它操作的累积回报应该 ≥ buy-and-hold。35 年真实 S&P 500 数据下：

The most direct test: if SMA crossover signals work, the cumulative returns from following them should be ≥ buy-and-hold. Over 35 years of real S&P 500 data:

图 1Figure 1
$1 在 1990 年投入各策略，到 2024 年的累积价值 Growth of $1 invested in 1990, by strategy, through 2024
对数纵轴 · 黑线 = buy-and-hold · 绿线 = SMA 50/200 · 蓝色系 = 较短周期策略 Log y-axis · Black = buy-and-hold · Green = SMA 50/200 · Blue tones = shorter-period strategies
数据来源：Yahoo Finance, ^GSPC daily adjusted close, 1990-01-02 至 2024-12-31, n=8,817 obs [2]。方法：当 fast SMA > slow SMA 时持有指数；信号在 t 日发出，t+1 日开盘执行（避免 look-ahead bias）。0bps 交易成本假设。所有计算使用本文 Python 代码 [3]。 Source: Yahoo Finance, ^GSPC daily adjusted close, 1990-01-02 to 2024-12-31, n=8,817 obs [2]. Method: Hold index when fast SMA > slow SMA; signal generated at t, executed at t+1 open (no look-ahead). Zero transaction cost assumed. Reproducible Python code [3].

几个值得停下来看的数字：

A few numbers worth pausing on:

SMA 5/20 把 $1 变成 $3.1，而 buy-and-hold 把同一个 $1 变成 $16.4。这是均线交叉拥趸最不愿意看到的图——按教科书操作，35 年里你的本金少赚了 $13.3。年化收益率 +3.29% vs 持有不动的 +8.31%——前者甚至跑不赢通胀。

SMA 5/20 turned $1 into $3.1, while buy-and-hold turned the same $1 into $16.4. This is the chart golden-cross enthusiasts least want to see — following the textbook rule lost you $13.3 of profit over 35 years. CAGR of +3.29% vs +8.31% for buy-and-hold — the strategy can't even beat inflation.

SMA 50/200 是个特殊例子。它的最终累积值 $15.6 几乎追上了 buy-and-hold 的 $16.4——而且它的年化波动率只有 12.85% 远低于 B&H 的 18.03%，最大回撤 -33.9% 也远好于 B&H 的 -56.8%。它的 Sharpe 比率 0.363 实际上高于 buy-and-hold 的 0.267。这是真实的——但让我们在 § 09 仔细谈这件事，因为它和"用均线交叉做择时"是完全不同的两件事。

SMA 50/200 is a special case. Its final value of $15.6 nearly matches buy-and-hold's $16.4 — and its annualized vol of 12.85% is well below B&H's 18.03%, with max drawdown of -33.9% vs -56.8%. Its Sharpe ratio of 0.363 actually beats buy-and-hold's 0.267. This is real — but we'll discuss it carefully in § 09, because it's a fundamentally different thing from the "golden cross / death cross" trading rule.

表 1 · 各策略 35 年期表现 (S&P 500, 1990-2024) Table 1 · Strategy performance, 35-year period (S&P 500, 1990–2024)
策略Strategy CAGR 波动率Vol Sharpe Max DD
Buy & Hold +8.31% 18.03% +0.267 −56.8%
SMA 5/20 +3.29% 10.95% −0.019 −45.2%
SMA 10/30 +4.65% 10.96% +0.105 −31.6%
SMA 20/60 +5.26% 11.41% +0.154 −38.8%
SMA 50/200 +8.16% 12.85% +0.363 −33.9%
数据来源：Yahoo Finance, ^GSPC, 1990-2024。Sharpe = (CAGR − rf) / 年化波动率，rf = 3.5% (10年期美国国债 1995-2024 算术均值, FRED DGS10 [4])。所有 SMA 策略均不含交易成本（§ 06 测试加入成本后的衰减）。关键观察：5/20、10/30、20/60 三个"流行"周期的 Sharpe 都远低于 buy-and-hold；只有 50/200 这种"长慢"周期 Sharpe 较高，但其 CAGR 仍略低于 B&H。 Source: Yahoo Finance ^GSPC, 1990-2024. Sharpe = (CAGR − rf) / annualized vol; rf = 3.5% (long-run avg of 10y US Treasury, FRED DGS10 [4]). All strategies before transaction cost (§ 06 tests cost sensitivity). Key observation: the three "popular" periods (5/20, 10/30, 20/60) all have Sharpe well below buy-and-hold; only the slow 50/200 has higher Sharpe, though its CAGR is still slightly below B&H.

检验 2：MACD 金叉死叉的事件研究 Test 2: MACD Cross Event Study

MACD 在中文炒股圈被赋予了几乎神秘色彩——"零轴上方金叉强势上涨"、"零轴下方死叉抛售信号"等说法在抖音/B站上随处可见。我们做最严格的可证伪检验：如果 MACD 金叉真的是买入信号，那么金叉发生后 N 天的回报应该显著高于随机日的同期回报。

MACD enjoys an almost mystical status in Chinese retail trading culture — "golden cross above zero = strong uptrend", "death cross below zero = sell signal" are TikTok and Bilibili staples. Most rigorous falsifiable test: if MACD golden crosses are real buy signals, returns N days after should be significantly higher than returns over the same window starting on a random day.

图 2Figure 2
金叉、死叉、随机日之后的前向回报分布 Forward return distributions after golden / death / random days
小提琴图显示分布形状 · 菱形 = 均值 · 三组分布几乎完全重叠 Violin plots show distribution shapes · Diamonds = means · The three distributions are nearly identical
方法：MACD(12,26,9) 标准参数，金叉 = MACD 线由下穿越信号线、死叉相反。前向回报 = (P(t+N) / P(t) − 1) × 100。三组样本：n=371 金叉、n=371 死叉、n=8,070 随机日。可视化裁剪到 1-99 百分位以便清晰对比，但所有统计基于完整样本。 Method: MACD(12,26,9) standard parameters; golden cross = MACD line crosses above signal line, death cross opposite. Forward return = (P(t+N) / P(t) − 1) × 100. Three samples: n=371 golden, n=371 death, n=8,070 random. Visualization clipped to 1st-99th percentile for clarity; all statistics computed on full sample.

三种检验方法都给出同一个结论。

Three test methods agree.

表 2 · MACD 信号的统计检验结果 (S&P 500, 1990-2024) Table 2 · Statistical tests of MACD signals (S&P 500, 1990–2024)
前向天数Horizon 金叉均值Golden 死叉均值Death 随机均值Random Δ (金叉−随机)(G−R) t-p MW-p Boot-p
+5d +0.14% +0.38% +0.18% −0.04pp 0.744 0.936 0.757
+20d +0.68% +0.57% +0.76% −0.09pp 0.694 0.743 0.718
+60d +1.83% +1.92% +2.29% −0.46pp 0.224 0.159 0.238
方法：Welch t 检验（unequal variances, scipy.stats.ttest_ind）；Mann-Whitney U（scipy.stats.mannwhitneyu, alternative='two-sided'）；Bootstrap 置换检验（5,000 次随机重排 pooled 样本，[5]）。关键观察：9 个 p 值全部 > 0.05，无法拒绝零假设。Δ 均为负——金叉之后的回报实际上比随机日略低。最反直觉的：+5 天回报，死叉 (+0.38%) 比金叉 (+0.14%) 还高——这正是均值回归 (mean reversion) 在起作用，与"金叉买入"的直觉完全相反。 Method: Welch's t-test (scipy.stats.ttest_ind, unequal variances); Mann-Whitney U (scipy.stats.mannwhitneyu, two-sided); Bootstrap permutation test (5,000 random shuffles of pooled sample [5]). Key observation: All 9 p-values > 0.05, cannot reject H0. All Δ values negative — golden-cross returns slightly below random. Most counterintuitive: at +5 days, death cross (+0.38%) actually outperforms golden cross (+0.14%) — mean reversion at work, the exact opposite of the "buy on golden cross" rule.

检验 3：参数网格 — 数据探查偏差的实证演示 Test 3: Parameter Grid — Demonstrating Data-Snooping Bias

很多读者读到上面的结果可能会想："5/20 不行可能因为周期不对，10/30 呢？或者 8/21？或者其他组合？" 这正是 Sullivan, Timmermann & White (1999) 在 Journal of Finance 上那篇里程碑论文 [6] 警告的数据探查偏差 (data-snooping bias)：如果你对一个数据集试足够多组合，总能找出一些"看起来有效"的——这并不意味着它们真的有信息。

Many readers will react: "5/20 may not work, but what about 10/30? Or 8/21? Or some other combo?" This is exactly the data-snooping bias warned of by Sullivan, Timmermann & White (1999) in their landmark Journal of Finance paper [6]: try enough combinations on a dataset and you'll find some that "look good" — without those signals carrying any real information.

让我们直接演示这一点。我们扫描所有 fast ∈ {3..30} × slow ∈ {20..200} 的 SMA 参数组合，共 1,018 个回测：

Let's demonstrate this directly. We scan all SMA parameter combinations with fast ∈ {3..30} × slow ∈ {20..200}, 1,018 backtests in total:

图 3Figure 3
1,018 个 SMA 参数组合的 Sharpe 比率热力图 Sharpe ratio heatmap across 1,018 SMA parameter combinations
绿色 = 高 Sharpe · 红色 = 负 Sharpe · 虚线 = 击败 buy-and-hold (0.27) 的等高线 · ★ = 历史最优组合 Green = high Sharpe · Red = negative Sharpe · Dashed contour = buy-and-hold threshold (0.27) · ★ = historical best
关键统计：1,018 个组合中，30% (303 个) 的 Sharpe 高于 buy-and-hold (0.27)；但所有 1,018 个都没有达到 Sharpe > 0.5 的"专业策略"门槛。中位数 Sharpe = 0.197，均值 Sharpe = 0.194 —— 都低于 buy-and-hold 的 0.267。最优组合 SMA 3/185 给出 Sharpe = 0.41，但这种"最优"组合在事前是无法识别的——这就是 STW 1999 警告的数据探查偏差。 Key statistics: Of 1,018 combos, 30% (303) have Sharpe above buy-and-hold (0.27); but none of the 1,018 achieve Sharpe > 0.5, the typical "professional strategy" threshold. Median Sharpe = 0.197, mean Sharpe = 0.194 — both below buy-and-hold's 0.267. Best combo SMA 3/185 gives Sharpe = 0.41, but this "best" combo cannot be identified ex ante — exactly the data-snooping bias STW (1999) warned about.

这张图的几个观察值得记住：

A few observations to remember:

30% 的组合"击败"buy-and-hold——这数字看起来很大，但请记住：30% 已经是事后挑选了 35 年完整数据中的最优；事前你不知道哪 30% 会赢。如果你随机选一个流行参数（5/20、10/30、12/26 等），你正好选中那 30% 的概率不大。这正是 STW 用 White's Reality Check 方法证明的：调整数据探查后，没有一个简单技术规则在样本外稳定显著。

30% of combos "beat" buy-and-hold — sounds substantial, but remember: 30% is the ex post count after seeing all 35 years; ex ante you don't know which 30% will win. If you randomly pick a popular parameter (5/20, 10/30, 12/26 etc.), the chance you pick a winner is moderate at best. This is what STW proved with White's Reality Check methodology: adjusting for data-snooping, no simple technical rule survives out-of-sample significance.

Sharpe > 0.5 的组合：0/1018 = 0%。专业量化策略追求 Sharpe ≥ 1.0；对冲基金 LP 通常要求 Sharpe ≥ 0.7 才考虑。1,018 个朴素 SMA 组合中没有一个能达到这个门槛——即使在最理想的事后挑选下。

Sharpe > 0.5: 0/1,018 = 0%. Professional quant strategies target Sharpe ≥ 1.0; hedge fund LPs typically require Sharpe ≥ 0.7 even to consider. None of 1,018 naive SMA combos clears this bar — even with maximally generous ex post selection.

"最优"组合是 SMA 3/185。没有任何技术分析教材会推荐这个组合——它不在任何流行参数列表里。这恰好说明：在事前，你无法系统地选择"那一个"会成功的参数。

The "best" combo is SMA 3/185. No technical analysis textbook recommends this — it appears in no popular parameter list. This is precisely the point: ex ante, you have no systematic way to select "the one" combination that will succeed.

检验 4：交易成本敏感性 Test 4: Transaction Cost Sensitivity

即使我们假设你幸运地选中了一个无成本下"赢"的组合，还有一个杀手在等着：交易成本。BLL (1992) 的原始论文没有充分讨论这点；这是 STW (1999) 之后所有严肃技术分析检验都必须处理的问题。

Even if you luckily picked a "winning" combo before costs, another killer awaits: transaction costs. BLL (1992) didn't fully address this; every serious technical analysis test after STW (1999) must handle it.

图 4Figure 4
交易成本对 SMA 策略 Sharpe 比率的侵蚀 Impact of transaction costs on SMA strategy Sharpe ratios
虚线 = buy-and-hold 参考 · 黄色阴影 = 散户典型成本区间 (10-30 bps) Dashed = buy-and-hold reference · Yellow band = typical retail cost zone (10–30 bps)
方法：每次仓位变动收取一次 round-trip 成本 (开仓 + 平仓双向)。基点 (bps) 是 0.01%。关键发现：SMA 5/20 每年换手 7.6 次，在 10bps 成本下 Sharpe 跌至 −0.16，在 50bps 跌至 −0.70；SMA 10/30 在 20bps 成本下也变成负 Sharpe。只有 SMA 50/200（每年仅 0.4 次换手）几乎不受成本影响。这正是 BLL → STW → Bajgrowicz-Scaillet (2012) [7] 这条学术脉络反复强调的。 Method: One round-trip cost per position change (open + close). Basis point = 0.01%. Key finding: SMA 5/20 turns over 7.6 times/year; at 10bps cost its Sharpe falls to −0.16, at 50bps to −0.70. SMA 10/30 also turns negative at 20bps. Only SMA 50/200 (0.4 turns/year) is largely unaffected. This is exactly what BLL → STW → Bajgrowicz-Scaillet (2012) [7] emphasized.

中国 A 股市场散户平均交易成本约 10-30 bps（含印花税 5bps + 佣金 + 滑点），美股约 5-15 bps。在这个真实的成本区间下：

Chinese A-share retail investors face roughly 10-30 bps total cost (5bps stamp tax + commission + slippage); US retail is roughly 5-15 bps. Within this realistic range:

• SMA 5/20 在所有现实成本下都是负 Sharpe — 几乎确定亏钱
• SMA 10/30 在 ≥ 10bps 成本下变成负 Sharpe
• 只有 SMA 50/200 在所有成本区间下保持正 Sharpe — 但其优势来自换手率极低（一年才 0.4 次）

• SMA 5/20 has negative Sharpe at every realistic cost level — almost guaranteed to lose money
• SMA 10/30 turns negative at ≥ 10bps
• Only SMA 50/200 stays positive across all cost levels — but its edge comes from extremely low turnover (0.4 round-trips/year)

检验 5：滚动信息系数 (IC) Test 5: Rolling Information Coefficient

量化金融判断一个信号是否"有用"的标准工具是信息系数 (Information Coefficient, IC)——信号值与未来回报的 Pearson 相关性。专业量化基金通常追求 IC ≥ 0.05（这已经是很弱的信号）；IC ≥ 0.1 算"强信号"。

The standard quant tool for assessing whether a signal "works" is the Information Coefficient (IC) — Pearson correlation between signal value and future return. Professional quant funds typically target IC ≥ 0.05 (already weak); IC ≥ 0.1 counts as "strong."

我们用 SMA 10/30 的连续信号值（(SMA10 − SMA30) / SMA30）与 20 天未来回报，在 252 天滚动窗口下计算相关性：

We use SMA 10/30 continuous signal value ((SMA10 − SMA30) / SMA30) and 20-day forward returns, computed as Pearson correlation over rolling 252-day windows:

图 5Figure 5
滚动 IC 时序图：SMA 信号在 35 年中绝大多数时段是反向预测 Rolling IC time series: SMA signal is negatively predictive most of 35 years
绿色 = IC 正值（信号有效） · 红色 = IC 负值（信号反向） · 黑线 = 6 个月平滑 Green = positive IC (signal works) · Red = negative IC (signal inverted) · Black = 6-month smoothing
方法：SMA 信号 = (SMA10 − SMA30) / SMA30，连续值。前向回报 = 20 天后价格 / 当前价格 − 1。Pearson 相关性在 252 天滚动窗口下计算。关键观察：S&P 500 上 35 年的平均 IC = −0.189，仅有 17.1% 的时段 IC > 0。如果 SMA 信号真的有效，这两个数字应该是 +0.05+ 和 60%+。上证综指上情况稍好但仍是负的（mean IC = −0.095，28.7% 时段为正），可能反映 A 股的均值反转特性更弱。 Method: SMA signal = (SMA10 − SMA30) / SMA30, continuous values. Forward return = 20-day-ahead price / current price − 1. Pearson correlation computed on 252-day rolling windows. Key observation: Mean IC over 35 years = −0.189 on S&P 500, with only 17.1% of windows showing IC > 0. If the SMA signal worked, these would be +0.05+ and 60%+. The Shanghai Composite is somewhat less negative (mean IC = −0.095, 28.7% of windows positive), perhaps reflecting weaker mean reversion in A-shares.

负 IC 的解读：信号触发"买入"时，未来 20 天回报实际上略低于平均；信号触发"卖出"时，未来 20 天回报实际上略高于平均。这正是短期均值反转 (short-term mean reversion) 的经典证据——价格在快速上涨后倾向于均值回归——这是金融文献中确证的现象 (Lo & MacKinlay 1990 [8])。SMA 交叉信号本质是趋势跟踪 (momentum-following)，而短期内市场行为更像均值反转——这就是为什么 SMA 交叉在短期上是反向信号。

Interpretation of negative IC: when the signal says "buy", the next 20 days actually return slightly less than average; when it says "sell", the next 20 days return slightly more. This is classic short-term mean reversion — prices tend to revert after sharp moves — a documented phenomenon (Lo & MacKinlay 1990 [8]). SMA crossover signals are momentum-following by nature, but short-term market behavior is mean-reverting — so SMA crossovers are contrarian signals at short horizons.

学界证据：从 BLL 1992 到 Bajgrowicz-Scaillet 2012 Academic Evidence: From BLL 1992 to Bajgrowicz-Scaillet 2012

本文的发现并非孤立——它与一条 30 年学术脉络一致。这条线索值得简要重述，因为它本身就是金融经济学方法论史上最有教益的故事之一。

Our findings are not in isolation — they align with a 30-year academic lineage. This thread is worth briefly retelling, as it is itself one of the most pedagogically rich stories in financial econometrics.

第一幕：BLL (1992) — 看似的发现

Act One: BLL (1992) — The Apparent Finding

Brock, Lakonishok & LeBaron 在 Journal of Finance 上发表了一篇引发轰动的论文 [9]。他们用 1897-1986 年共 90 年的道琼斯工业指数日数据，测试 26 种简单技术规则（包括各种 SMA 交叉），结论是"这些技术策略获得了显著的超额收益，结果与四种主流零模型（随机游走、AR(1)、GARCH-M、EGARCH）都不一致"[9]。这似乎为技术分析提供了强有力的实证支持。

Brock, Lakonishok & LeBaron published a sensational paper in Journal of Finance [9]. Using 90 years (1897-1986) of Dow Jones daily data, they tested 26 simple technical rules (including various SMA crossovers), concluding: "these technical strategies provide significant excess returns, results that are not consistent with four popular null models (random walk, AR(1), GARCH-M, EGARCH)" [9]. This seemed to provide strong empirical support for technical analysis.

第二幕：STW (1999) — 数据探查偏差的反驳

Act Two: STW (1999) — The Data-Snooping Refutation

七年后，Sullivan, Timmermann & White 用 White (2000) 的 Reality Check bootstrap 方法重新检验 [6]。他们扩展 BLL 的 26 条规则到全 universe，应用到 100 年道琼斯数据，并明确量化数据探查偏差。结论：调整数据探查偏差后，1986-1996 年样本外测试中，技术规则的"超额收益"消失。STW 的核心论点是：BLL 没考虑到他们测试的 26 条规则本身就是从历史上"看起来有效"的规则中筛选出来的——这本身就构成了数据探查。

Seven years later, Sullivan, Timmermann & White re-examined using White (2000)'s Reality Check bootstrap methodology [6]. They expanded BLL's 26 rules to a full universe, applied to 100 years of Dow data, and explicitly quantified data-snooping bias. Conclusion: after adjusting for data-snooping, the apparent excess returns of technical rules vanish in 1986-1996 out-of-sample tests. STW's central point: BLL didn't consider that their 26 rules were themselves selected from historically "good-looking" rules — which is itself data-snooping.

第三幕：Bajgrowicz-Scaillet (2012) — FDR 方法的进一步确认

Act Three: Bajgrowicz-Scaillet (2012) — Further Confirmation via FDR

2012 年，Bajgrowicz & Scaillet 在 Journal of Financial Economics 发表 [7]，使用更先进的 False Discovery Rate (FDR) 方法和 Hansen (2005) 的 Superior Predictive Ability test，扩展样本到 1897-2011。他们的结论："调整多重检验后，没有证据表明技术交易规则能获得超出 buy-and-hold 的交易利润"。这一论文广泛被视为这一争议的"最终判决"。

In 2012, Bajgrowicz & Scaillet published in Journal of Financial Economics [7], using more advanced False Discovery Rate (FDR) methods and Hansen (2005)'s Superior Predictive Ability test, with sample extended to 1897-2011. Conclusion: "after adjusting for multiple testing, we find no evidence that technical trading rules provide trading profits in excess of buy-and-hold." This paper is widely regarded as the "final verdict" on this debate.

第四幕：中国市场的复制研究

Act Four: Chinese Market Replications

这套检验在中国市场也被反复进行。Chen, Huang & Lai (2015) 用上证综指 1992-2013 + 深证综指 1991-2013 的日数据 [10]，应用 White Reality Check 方法。他们的发现："在不考虑交易成本时，最佳交易规则确实能击败 buy-and-hold；但加入交易成本后，A 股市场无证据表明技术规则系统性盈利。" 这与本文检验在 SSE 上的发现完全一致。

These tests have been repeatedly performed on Chinese markets. Chen, Huang & Lai (2015) used Shanghai Composite (1992-2013) and Shenzhen Composite (1991-2013) daily data [10], applying White Reality Check. They found: "absent transaction costs, the best trading rule does beat buy-and-hold; with realistic costs included, no evidence that technical rules systematically profit in A-shares." This aligns with our SSE findings.

区分：朴素 MA 交叉 vs 学术"动量" Distinction: Naive MA Crossover vs Academic "Momentum"

这一节非常重要——因为读者很可能会问："那为什么 Jegadeesh & Titman (1993) [11] 的'动量异常 (momentum anomaly)'又被广泛接受？这不就是技术分析吗？"

This section matters greatly — because a reader will likely ask: "But what about Jegadeesh & Titman (1993)'s widely-accepted 'momentum anomaly' [11]? Isn't that technical analysis?"

表面上是的，但实际上完全不同。让我精确区分：

Superficially yes, but in reality very different. Let me draw the distinction precisely:

"均线交叉"流言是时间序列动量 (time-series momentum)——你看一只股票自己的价格历史，根据它过去 N 天的均线情况决定买卖。它问："这只股票最近趋势如何？"

The "golden cross" myth is time-series momentum — you look at a single stock's own price history, deciding to trade based on its own SMA pattern. It asks: "What is this stock's recent trend?"

Jegadeesh-Titman 动量是截面动量 (cross-sectional momentum)——在一组股票中，根据它们过去 3-12 个月的排名，买入排名靠前的（"赢家"），卖出排名靠后的（"输家"）。它问："哪些股票相对于其他股票最近表现最好？"

Jegadeesh-Titman momentum is cross-sectional momentum — among a group of stocks, you rank by their past 3-12 month returns and buy the top-ranked ("winners"), sell the bottom-ranked ("losers"). It asks: "Which stocks have done best recently relative to others?"

这两者在数学上、在投资逻辑上、在学术地位上，是完全不同的。Jegadeesh-Titman 动量在 30 年后被 Asness, Moskowitz & Pedersen (2013) 在 8 个资产类别中证实存在 [12]，是少数被广泛接受的"市场异常"之一。但这种动量需要：

These are mathematically, logically, and academically different. Jegadeesh-Titman momentum was confirmed across 8 asset classes 30 years later by Asness, Moskowitz & Pedersen (2013) [12], and is one of the few widely-accepted "market anomalies." But this momentum requires:

• 大量股票（典型构造：100 只股票按过去 6 个月回报排序，买前 10、卖后 10）
• 较长持有期（3-12 个月，不是 5 天 20 天）
• 多空对冲（不是单只股票的择时）
• 因子风险敞口（动量本身被认为是一个独立的风险因子）
• 专业基础设施（散户极难复制）

• Many stocks (typical construction: rank 100 stocks by past 6-month returns, long top 10, short bottom 10)
• Longer holding periods (3-12 months, not 5 or 20 days)
• Long-short hedging (not single-stock timing)
• Factor risk exposure (momentum is itself considered an independent risk factor)
• Professional infrastructure (retail can hardly replicate)

"均线交叉择时"和 Jegadeesh-Titman 动量的关系，类似于"看星象算运气"和"用引力理论计算天体轨道"的关系——后者是科学，前者借用了一些表面相似的语汇，但本质完全不同。

The relationship between "golden cross" and Jegadeesh-Titman momentum is like the relationship between "reading the stars for luck" and "using gravity to compute planetary orbits" — the latter is science, the former borrows some superficially similar vocabulary but is fundamentally different.

为什么这个流言这么有传播力 Why the Myth Spreads So Well

数据已否定，学界已否定，但均线交叉教学依然在 2026 年的中文短视频平台上每天产生千万级播放量。这背后有几个心理学和认知机制——其中两个我们在前两期已经介绍过 (后视偏差、宿命论的心理舒适)，这一期我们补充几个技术分析特有的：

Data refute it, academia refutes it, yet golden-cross tutorials generate tens of millions of views daily on Chinese short-video platforms in 2026. Several psychological and cognitive mechanisms are at work — two we've covered in previous issues (hindsight bias, fatalist comfort), this issue adds several specific to technical analysis:

  1. 视觉模式识别的进化漏洞

    Visual pattern recognition's evolutionary loophole

    人脑被进化塑造成在草丛中识别老虎的模式识别机器——但这种能力被滥用在没有真实模式的随机噪声上。Mandelbrot & Hudson (2004) [13] 做过一个著名的演示：把纯随机游走序列画成 K 线图，让技术分析师"分析"——他们一样能找出"头肩顶"、"双底"、"金叉"。我们的视觉系统会从随机数据中创造出有意义的模式——这本身是科学心理学中的标准发现 (apophenia)。

    The human brain evolved as a pattern-recognition machine optimized to spot tigers in tall grass — and misapplies this capacity to random noise without real patterns. Mandelbrot & Hudson (2004) [13] ran a famous demonstration: draw pure random walks as candlestick charts, give them to technical analysts — they readily identified "head and shoulders", "double bottom", "golden crosses". Our visual system invents meaningful patterns from random data — a standard finding in cognitive psychology (apophenia).

  2. 幸存者偏差与教学陷阱

    Survivorship bias in teaching

    所有技术分析教学视频都展示金叉之后大涨的成功案例——但每一个成功案例背后都有 5-10 个失败案例（你看本文图 2，金叉之后 5 天均值仅 +0.14%，比随机日 +0.18% 还低）。教学者从浩如烟海的历史 K 线图里挑选最适合演示的几个——这就是经典的幸存者偏差 + 选择性呈现。学生看到的成功率是 100%，真实成功率约 50%（即随机水平）。

    All technical analysis tutorial videos show cases where golden cross was followed by big rallies — but every success story has 5-10 failures behind it (Figure 2: after a golden cross, average +5d return is +0.14%, even less than random days' +0.18%). Tutors cherry-pick from a vast pool of historical charts — classic survivorship bias + selective presentation. Students see 100% success rate; real success is ~50% (random).

  3. "我能控制"的幻觉

    Illusion of control

    告诉一个新手"股市基本不可预测，最理性的策略是定投指数 ETF"——这话听起来令人沮丧。告诉同一个人"学会读 K 线图，就能在金叉时买、死叉时卖，跑赢专业人士"——这话提供了掌控感。心理学家 Ellen Langer (1975) 称之为掌控幻觉 (illusion of control) [14]：人类倾向于高估自己对随机过程的控制能力。这种幻觉是技术分析教学产业的心理基础。

    Tell a beginner "the market is largely unpredictable; the most rational strategy is dollar-cost-averaging into an index ETF" — this sounds depressing. Tell the same person "learn to read candlestick charts, and you can buy on golden crosses, sell on death crosses, beat the professionals" — this provides a sense of agency. Psychologist Ellen Langer (1975) called this the illusion of control [14]: humans systematically overestimate their control over random processes. This illusion is the psychological foundation of the technical analysis tutorial industry.

  4. 行业激励的扭曲

    Industry incentive distortions

    谁从教技术分析中赚钱？券商（散户高频交易意味着更多佣金）、付费"老师"（技术分析课程是金融信息产业最大的细分市场之一）、自动交易软件销售商。"均线交叉"是易学、易讲、易卖的产品。"指数定投"在商业上几乎没人推广——因为它不需要老师、不需要软件、不需要每天关注。诚实的金融教育（Burton Malkiel 的《漫步华尔街》已经写了 12 版）总是受到行业激励的系统性挤压。

    Who profits from teaching technical analysis? Brokers (retail high-frequency trading = more commissions), paid "teachers" (technical analysis courses are one of the largest segments of the financial info industry), trading software vendors. "Golden cross / death cross" is easy to learn, easy to teach, easy to sell. "Just index-DCA" has almost no commercial backing — it requires no teacher, no software, no daily attention. Honest financial education (Burton Malkiel's A Random Walk Down Wall Street is now in its 12th edition) is systematically crowded out by industry incentives.

什么是诚实的版本 A More Honest Version

否定"均线交叉是预测信号"不等于否定所有关于均线的应用。诚实的版本是：

Rejecting "golden cross as predictive signal" doesn't mean rejecting all uses of moving averages. Honest version:

慢速 SMA（如 50/200）作为风险管理工具是有效的

Slow SMAs (e.g., 50/200) are effective as risk-management tools

本文 § 03 已经显示，SMA 50/200 在 35 年 S&P 500 上 Sharpe = 0.363 > B&H 0.267。但请仔细看：它的 CAGR 是 +8.16%，低于 B&H 的 +8.31%。它的优势不是"赚更多钱"，而是"少受罪"——波动率从 18% 降到 13%，最大回撤从 -57% 降到 -34%。它在 2002 和 2008 这种危机中机械性退出仓位，避开了惨烈的下跌。

Section § 03 showed SMA 50/200's Sharpe = 0.363 > B&H 0.267 over 35 years on S&P 500. But look carefully: its CAGR is +8.16%, less than B&H's +8.31%. Its edge is not "make more money" but "suffer less" — vol drops from 18% to 13%, max DD from -57% to -34%. It mechanically exits during crises like 2002 and 2008, avoiding the worst drawdowns.

这是 Faber (2007) "Quantitative Approach to Tactical Asset Allocation" [15] 论文的核心发现，被广泛复制：用 200 日均线做风险开关（价格 > 200日均线就持有，否则持有现金）能显著降低尾部风险，对风险厌恶投资者有用。

This is the core finding of Faber (2007)'s "Quantitative Approach to Tactical Asset Allocation" [15], which has been widely replicated: using the 200-day SMA as a risk switch (hold when price > 200d SMA, otherwise cash) significantly reduces tail risk, useful for risk-averse investors.

但请注意区别：这不是"预测"，而是"机械避险"。它的"成功"完全建立在"长期股市上涨 + 偶尔暴跌"这种特定市场结构上。它不能告诉你"明天该买入"，只能告诉你"今天市场结构破坏了，机械退出"。

But note the difference: this is not "prediction" but "mechanical risk control". Its "success" rests entirely on the market structure of "long-term uptrend + occasional crashes." It cannot tell you "buy tomorrow", only "today the trend has broken, mechanically exit."

区别在哪里

Where the line lies

不可证伪/已被证伪的命题："5 日线上穿 20 日线就买入，跑赢市场" — 本文 5 个独立检验全部否定。

Unfalsifiable / refuted claims: "Buy when 5-day SMA crosses above 20-day SMA, beat the market" — refuted by all 5 tests in this article.

可证伪且部分通过验证的命题："用 200 日均线作为风险开关能降低最大回撤" — Faber (2007) 等多篇研究确认 [15]，本文 SMA 50/200 也复制了这个结论（max DD -34% vs B&H -57%）。

Falsifiable and partly supported claims: "Using the 200-day SMA as a risk switch reduces max drawdown" — confirmed by Faber (2007) and others [15]; our SMA 50/200 replicates this (max DD -34% vs B&H -57%).

另一类完全合法的命题："截面动量 (Jegadeesh-Titman) 是真实的市场异常" — 30+ 年文献广泛确认 [11][12]。但这与"均线交叉择时"是完全不同的事情。

A separate, fully legitimate claim: "Cross-sectional momentum (Jegadeesh-Titman) is a real market anomaly" — confirmed by 30+ years of literature [11][12]. But this is a fundamentally different thing from "golden cross timing."

实践含义 Practical Takeaway

如果你是普通投资者：定投宽基指数 ETF 是数学上最优的策略（Buffett 2007 年发起的"十年赌局"以巨大优势击败对冲基金 [16]，本质就是这个故事）。如果你想加入风险管理元素：可以考虑 200 日均线作为风险开关（"价格跌破 200日均线时减仓"），但要清楚这只是少受罪不是赚更多。"5/20 金叉买入"这种短周期信号无论如何不要碰——本文已严格证明它是反向信号。

If you're a regular investor: dollar-cost-averaging into broad-index ETFs is mathematically optimal (Buffett's 2007 "Million-Dollar Bet" that index funds would beat hedge funds [16] is exactly this story, decisively won). If you want to add risk management: consider the 200-day SMA as a risk switch ("reduce position when price drops below 200d SMA"), but understand this only reduces suffering, doesn't add returns. The "5/20 golden cross buy" short-period signal — don't touch it. This article has rigorously demonstrated it's a contrarian signal.

方法论说明与局限 Methodological Notes & Limitations

价格回报，未含股息再投资。S&P 500 含股息总回报率历史均值 ~10%/年，本文使用价格回报 ~8.3%/年。这意味着我们对 buy-and-hold 是偏保守的——加入股息后 B&H 的优势更大，结论方向不变。

Price returns only, no dividend reinvestment. S&P 500 total return averages ~10%/yr historically; this article uses price-only ~8.3%/yr. This means we're biased against buy-and-hold — including dividends would widen B&H's lead, conclusion direction unchanged.

无杠杆，无空头。本文测试的 SMA 策略只有"持仓"和"现金"两种状态。如果加入杠杆和空头，结果会更复杂——但 § 04 的 MACD 事件研究表明死叉之后的回报实际上略高，所以加入空头会让短期策略表现更差，不是更好。

No leverage, no short selling. SMA strategies tested have only "long" or "cash" states. Adding leverage and shorts would complicate matters — but § 04's MACD event study shows post-death-cross returns are actually slightly higher, so adding shorts would make short-period strategies worse, not better.

仅检验最简单的两种技术工具：SMA 交叉与 MACD。真实的技术分析工具远不止这些 (RSI、布林带、波浪理论、艾略特、缠论等)。但这些工具都基于价格历史模式识别这一同样的认识论基础，因此面临同样的根本问题。Park & Irwin (2007) 在 Journal of Economic Surveys 综述了 95 篇技术分析实证研究 [17]，结论：所有方法在严格的样本外检验和成本调整后表现都不如 buy-and-hold。

Only the two simplest technical tools tested: SMA crossover and MACD. Real technical analysis includes many more (RSI, Bollinger Bands, Elliott Wave, etc.). But all rest on the same epistemological foundation of price-pattern recognition and face the same fundamental problem. Park & Irwin (2007) in Journal of Economic Surveys reviewed 95 empirical studies of technical analysis [17], concluding all methods underperform buy-and-hold under rigorous out-of-sample testing with realistic costs.

专业量化基金大量使用复杂技术信号——但这与本文讨论的"教科书技术分析"是两回事。专业基金使用的是高维多因子模型、深度学习、订单流分析等，与"5 日均线穿 20 日均线"完全不是一个量级的复杂度。本文的证伪范围明确针对"散户教学版本"。

Professional quant funds use sophisticated technical signals at scale — but this is different from "textbook technical analysis." Professional funds use high-dimensional multifactor models, deep learning, order flow analysis, etc. — not in the same complexity class as "5-day SMA crosses 20-day SMA." This article's refutation explicitly targets the "retail teaching version."

上证综指数据起始于 1997-07，比 S&P 500 短约 7 年。这是 Yahoo Finance 上 SSE 数据的可用范围限制。如果使用 1990 年起的中文本地数据源，SSE 子样本会更长，但结论方向不变（实际上 1990 年代中国股市的早期波动会让 SMA 策略相对表现更糟）。

Shanghai Composite data starts 1997-07, ~7 years shorter than S&P 500. This is Yahoo Finance's availability limit. Local Chinese data sources back to 1990 would extend the SSE sample but wouldn't change the direction (in fact, the wild early-1990s A-share volatility would make SMA strategies look worse).

完全可复现 Fully Reproducible

本文所有数字、表格、图表均由开源 Python 代码 + 公开数据生成，欢迎复现、质疑、修正。代码、数据、Jupyter notebook 全部在 GitHub 上 MIT 协议公开：

Every number, table, and figure in this article is generated by open-source Python code + public data. Replication, critique, and corrections are welcome. Code, data, and Jupyter notebook are all available under MIT License at:

github.com/yifan70932/Simple-Moving-Average-Myth-Buster

包含：fetch_and_analyze.py（一键拉取 Yahoo Finance 数据 + 跑全部 5 个检验）、所有结果 CSV、5 个 matplotlib 图、完整 README。Python 3.10+ 与 yfinance/numpy/scipy/pandas/matplotlib，约 90 秒内可全部跑完。

Contents: fetch_and_analyze.py (one-shot Yahoo Finance data fetch + all 5 tests), all result CSVs, 5 matplotlib figures, full README. Python 3.10+ with yfinance/numpy/scipy/pandas/matplotlib; runs end-to-end in ~90 seconds.

引用与数据来源 References & Data Sources

  1. Murphy, J. J. (1999). Technical Analysis of the Financial Markets: A Comprehensive Guide to Trading Methods and Applications. New York Institute of Finance. The "market action discounts everything" axiom is the first of three foundational premises of technical analysis (Chapter 1).
  2. Yahoo Finance. S&P 500 (^GSPC) and Shanghai Composite (000001.SS) daily adjusted close prices, retrieved 2026 via the yfinance Python package. finance.yahoo.com/quote/^GSPC · finance.yahoo.com/quote/000001.SS.
  3. Reproducibility note: All backtests, statistical tests, and figures are open-source at github.com/yifan70932/Simple-Moving-Average-Myth-Buster. Implemented in Python 3.10+ with yfinance, numpy, scipy, pandas, matplotlib. Random seeds fixed at 42 for all bootstrap procedures. MIT licensed.
  4. Federal Reserve Bank of St. Louis. 10-Year Treasury Constant Maturity Rate, FRED series DGS10. Risk-free rate of 3.5% derived from 1995-2024 arithmetic average. fred.stlouisfed.org/series/DGS10
  5. Efron, B., & Tibshirani, R. J. (1993). An Introduction to the Bootstrap. Chapman & Hall/CRC. Permutation tests are described in Chapter 15. Standard reference for the bootstrap inference framework used here.
  6. Sullivan, R., Timmermann, A., & White, H. (1999). Data‐Snooping, Technical Trading Rule Performance, and the Bootstrap. The Journal of Finance, 54(5), 1647–1691. doi.org/10.1111/0022-1082.00163. The methodological landmark applying White's Reality Check to technical trading rules.
  7. Bajgrowicz, P., & Scaillet, O. (2012). Technical trading revisited: False discoveries, persistence tests, and transaction costs. Journal of Financial Economics, 106(3), 473–491. doi.org/10.1016/j.jfineco.2012.06.001. Uses False Discovery Rate methods on 1897-2011 DJIA data; finds no evidence of profits in excess of buy-and-hold after multiple testing adjustment.
  8. Lo, A. W., & MacKinlay, A. C. (1990). When Are Contrarian Profits Due to Stock Market Overreaction? Review of Financial Studies, 3(2), 175–205. doi.org/10.1093/rfs/3.2.175. Foundational evidence on short-term mean reversion in equity returns.
  9. Brock, W., Lakonishok, J., & LeBaron, B. (1992). Simple Technical Trading Rules and the Stochastic Properties of Stock Returns. The Journal of Finance, 47(5), 1731–1764. doi.org/10.1111/j.1540-6261.1992.tb04681.x. The famous initial paper claiming technical rules beat the market on DJIA 1897-1986; later refuted by STW 1999.
  10. Chen, S., Bao, S., & Zhou, Y. (2016). The predictive power of Japanese candlestick charting in Chinese stock market. Physica A, 457, 148-165. See also: Wei, J., et al. (2015). Profitability of simple technical trading rules of Chinese stock exchange indexes. Physica A, 439, 114-123. arxiv.org/abs/1504.04254. Applies Reality Check to SHCI/SZCI 1991-2013.
  11. Jegadeesh, N., & Titman, S. (1993). Returns to Buying Winners and Selling Losers: Implications for Stock Market Efficiency. The Journal of Finance, 48(1), 65–91. doi.org/10.1111/j.1540-6261.1993.tb04702.x. The seminal momentum anomaly paper, cited 17,000+ times.
  12. Asness, C. S., Moskowitz, T. J., & Pedersen, L. H. (2013). Value and Momentum Everywhere. The Journal of Finance, 68(3), 929–985. doi.org/10.1111/jofi.12021. Confirms momentum across 8 asset classes globally.
  13. Mandelbrot, B., & Hudson, R. L. (2004). The (Mis)Behavior of Markets: A Fractal View of Risk, Ruin, and Reward. Basic Books. Contains the famous "random walk vs. real market" pattern recognition demonstration in Chapter 1.
  14. Langer, E. J. (1975). The illusion of control. Journal of Personality and Social Psychology, 32(2), 311–328. doi.org/10.1037/0022-3514.32.2.311. Foundational psychology of human overestimation of agency over random outcomes.
  15. Faber, M. T. (2007). A Quantitative Approach to Tactical Asset Allocation. The Journal of Wealth Management, 9(4), 69-79. doi.org/10.3905/jwm.2007.674809. Demonstrates the 200-day SMA risk-switch's drawdown reduction across multiple asset classes.
  16. Buffett, W. E. (2017). The 2016 Berkshire Hathaway Annual Letter to Shareholders. The "Million-Dollar Bet" between Buffett and Protégé Partners (2008-2017): a low-cost S&P 500 index fund (Vanguard 500 Admiral) returned +125.8%, while the chosen hedge funds returned +36.3%. berkshirehathaway.com/letters/2016ltr.pdf
  17. Park, C. H., & Irwin, S. H. (2007). What Do We Know About the Profitability of Technical Analysis? Journal of Economic Surveys, 21(4), 786–826. doi.org/10.1111/j.1467-6419.2007.00519.x. Comprehensive survey of 95 modern empirical studies; finds that early studies showing profitability are likely affected by data-snooping, while modern studies with proper methodology show no profitability.
  18. Edwards, R. D., & Magee, J. (1948, 11th ed. 2018). Technical Analysis of Stock Trends. CRC Press. The canonical text on technical analysis, still in print after 75+ years.
  19. White, H. (2000). A Reality Check for Data Snooping. Econometrica, 68(5), 1097–1126. doi.org/10.1111/1468-0262.00152. The bootstrap methodology underlying STW (1999).
  20. Hansen, P. R. (2005). A Test for Superior Predictive Ability. Journal of Business & Economic Statistics, 23(4), 365–380. doi.org/10.1198/073500105000000063. Refinement of White's Reality Check; used in Bajgrowicz-Scaillet (2012).
  21. Fama, E. F. (1970). Efficient Capital Markets: A Review of Theory and Empirical Work. The Journal of Finance, 25(2), 383–417. doi.org/10.2307/2325486. The Efficient Market Hypothesis paper; the "weak form" excludes the possibility that price-history-based signals (i.e., technical analysis) can systematically generate excess returns.
  22. Lo, A. W., Mamaysky, H., & Wang, J. (2000). Foundations of Technical Analysis: Computational Algorithms, Statistical Inference, and Empirical Implementation. The Journal of Finance, 55(4), 1705–1765. doi.org/10.1111/0022-1082.00265. Tests classical chart patterns (head-and-shoulders, double-tops) using kernel regression; finds some patterns are statistically detectable, but with marginal economic significance.
  23. Malkiel, B. G. (2019). A Random Walk Down Wall Street: The Time-Tested Strategy for Successful Investing (12th ed.). W. W. Norton. The "financial astrology" quote is from this edition's chapter on technical analysis.
  24. SciPy. scipy.stats.ttest_ind (Welch's t-test) and scipy.stats.mannwhitneyu documentation. SciPy 1.11+.
  25. Pandas. pandas.Series.ewm for the exponentially weighted moving averages used in MACD calculation.
  26. Wilder, J. W. (1978). New Concepts in Technical Trading Systems. Trend Research. Original definition of the Relative Strength Index (RSI), one of the technical indicators we did not test in this article.
  27. Appel, G. (1979). The Moving Average Convergence Divergence Trading Method. Signalert. Original definition of MACD with the (12, 26, 9) default parameters used in this article.
Myth Busters · Yifan · 数据可复现 · 欢迎指出错误 Myth Busters · Yifan · Reproducible · Corrections welcome
v1.0 · 2026-05
